title: CapX2
body:
![CapX2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/chT14iKs/images/fe48a37069764573ad366497eb2c07eb27fe3e7a.gif)

Version two of the CapX1!  Changes include:

- Netherite, Diamond, and Iron Axes are now Scythes
- A retexture of Netherite and Diamond Swords
- No Explosion Particles
- Low Fire
- Potion retexture

**And More!**

Enjoy!
